data.body: Brainstormed + decomposed (see session_log rich-keel-pen / 31d6). Focus: CODE drift only (problem-2 ticket-field invalidation already shipped in dead-stalk-chasm). Model: dependency-scope, NO attribution (sibling exemption dissolves; content-addressed per-file hash signed into the manifest). Children: Story 1 jerky-vista-amok (22bf) = drift detect+invalidate (full re-review) + new DET P9 empty-file-impact warning; fixes worm-folly-barge over-invalidation. Story 2 grace-thud-feint (5a6c, depends_on S1) = narrowed delta-re-review over the enforced CODEBASE_GROUNDED set + chained attestation; descoped read-set capture & >N-files fallback per brainstorm.
